data.body: Completion evidence from 2026-07-21 in /private/tmp/codex-rebar-debug-fixes after canonical make worktree provisioning: (1) env PATH=/private/tmp/codex-rebar-debug-fixes/.venv/bin:/opt/homebrew/bin:/usr/local/bin:/usr/bin:/bin:/usr/sbin:/sbin make lint exited 0; output included 'All checks passed!', '1152 files already formatted', 'No findings to report', and actionlint completed. (2) The same PATH with make typecheck exited 0; output: 'Success: no issues found in 357 source files'. GitHub Gerrit Verified Gate run 29855745338 for change 869 also completed success: https://github.com/navapbc/rebar/actions/runs/29855745338. These results specifically demonstrate the documented per-command worktree PATH configuration makes both gates pass.
